title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾方式运行。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant
Any OS. Any Platform
The lobster way

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development.
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能体项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由AI代理管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建，完全无需人工干预开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills

summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱观察的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改进Claude Code的行为。

summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种AI模型，包括Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: Only 16 Percent of Americans Think AI Will Have a Positive Impact on Society
content: Article URL: https://techcrunch.com/2026/06/17/only-16-percent-of-americans-think-ai-will-have-a-positive-impact-on-society-a-new-study-shows/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48573332 Points: 380 # Comments: 460
summary: 一项新研究显示，仅16%的美国人认为AI将对社会产生积极影响，多数人对AI持负面或不确定态度。
highlights: Only 16 Percent of Americans Think AI Will Have a Positive Impact on Society
a new study shows

title: AI demands more engineering discipline. Not less
content: Article URL: https://charitydotwtf.substack.com/p/ai-demands-more-engineering-discipline Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48570948 Points: 386 # Comments: 192
summary: 文章主张AI开发需要更强的工程纪律，而非更少，强调在AI系统中应用严格工程原则的重要性。
highlights: AI demands more engineering discipline. Not less.
The article argues for rigorous engineering practices in AI development.
Points: 386, Comments: 192 on Hacker News.

title: Can gzip be a language model?
summary: 探讨gzip压缩算法是否可以作为语言模型使用，分析其文本建模能力。
highlights: Can gzip be a language model?
探讨gzip压缩算法是否可以作为语言模型使用

title: Why adding ontologies to LLMs won't yield machine intelligence
summary: 该视频讨论为何将本体论（ontologies）添加到大型语言模型（LLMs）中并不能实现真正的机器智能，认为本体论无法弥补LLMs在理解与推理方面的根本缺陷。
highlights: Adding ontologies to LLMs won't yield machine intelligence
本体论无法解决LLMs的深层理解问题

title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
content: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
summary: OpenAI与Molecule.one合作，展示了使用GPT-5.4的近自主AI化学家如何改进关键药物合成反应，推动药物化学研究进展。
highlights: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction
advancing medicinal chemistry research

title: Introducing LifeSciBench
content: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
summary: OpenAI 推出了 LifeSciBench，这是一个由专家编写和审查的基准测试，用于评估 AI 系统处理现实世界生命科学研究任务和决策的能力。
highlights: LifeSciBench 是一个专家编写和审查的基准测试
用于评估 AI 系统处理现实世界生命科学研究任务和决策的能力

title: MolmoMotion: Language-guided 3D motion forecasting
summary: MolmoMotion 是一个基于语言引导的3D运动预测模型，能够根据自然语言指令预测未来的人类运动轨迹，结合了视觉和语言信息以提升预测准确性。
highlights: MolmoMotion 利用自然语言指令来引导3D运动预测。
该模型结合视觉和语言信息，提升预测的准确性和上下文相关性。
适用于人机交互、自动驾驶等需要理解人类意图的场景。

title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
summary: 本文介绍了如何通过Strands Agents和LeRobot将Hugging Face Hub上的机器人模型部署到实际硬件上，详细说明了从模型选择、转换到硬件集成的完整流程，并强调了开源工具在加速机器人研发中的作用。
highlights: Strands Agents 和 LeRobot 提供了从 Hub 到硬件的无缝部署流程。
该方案支持多种机器人平台，降低了模型迁移成本。
开源社区协作是推动机器人技术落地的关键。
